lines.speaker: Sergeant Tobyn
lines.text: Good to see you, adventurer. Hope everything is going well for you out there.

lines.speaker: Sergeant Tobyn
lines.text: Glad to hear it. Did you end up travelling to Varlamore?

lines.speaker: Sergeant Tobyn
lines.text: Prince Itzla said that one of his people would meet you just outside the eastern gates. Might be worth heading over there.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I might just do that. Thanks!
